'''Korbin''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]].

==Government==
Lawless and without government, control of Korbin's cities were held by various criminal factions, with Korbin itself being considered an excellent port for [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]].<ref name="PoG2" />

==History==
Formerly a [[Mining/Legends|mining]] colony that exported minerals under [[Cross-Galactic Mining]], when the mines ran dry the planet's chief export became the export of fermented [[kyrf]].<ref name="PoG2" />

[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] lieutenant [[Ayla Shar]] was a native of Korbin.<ref name="air">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''</ref>

{{Planet-stub}}
